content:
# elizaos/eliza Daily Update (Apr 11, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development on April 11, 2026, focused on refining agent interaction logic through new pull requests and ongoing community discussions regarding third-party API integrations for agent decision-making.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS
*   **Action Handling and Response Logic**
    *   Initiated work to improve agent reliability by deduplicating identical action invocations and deferring replies in simple-mode. ([#6719](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6719))

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   [#6719](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6719): fix: dedupe identical action invocations + defer simple-mode reply.

## CLOSED ISSUES
*   *None*

## NEW ISSUES
*   *None*

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*   **[#6646](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/6646) Real-world x402 API for agent builders**
    *   Community members discussed the integration of the DeepBlue x402 API for agent economic decision-making, specifically regarding Polymarket odds and BTC signals. 
    *   Participants explored the potential for "coordination signals" and meta-consensus layers to assist agents in Schelling games. 
    *   The issue was closed with the clarification that third-party plugin proposals should be developed in independent repositories under the `elizaOS-plugins` organization and published to npm.
